from fastapi import FastAPI, BackgroundTasks

app = FastAPI()


async def send_welcome_email(user_email: str):
    await email_client.send(user_email, "Welcome!", "Thanks for signing up")


async def sync_to_crm(user_data: dict):
    await crm_client.create_contact(user_data)


async def generate_invoice(order_id: str):
    order = await db.get_order(order_id)
    pdf = render_invoice(order)
    await storage.upload(f"invoices/{order_id}.pdf", pdf)


@app.post("/register")
async def register(user: UserCreate, background_tasks: BackgroundTasks):
    created = await db.create_user(user)
    background_tasks.add_task(send_welcome_email, user.email)
    background_tasks.add_task(sync_to_crm, created.dict())
    return {"id": created.id}


@app.post("/orders")
async def create_order(order: OrderCreate, background_tasks: BackgroundTasks):
    result = await db.create_order(order)
    background_tasks.add_task(generate_invoice, result.id)
    return result
